# Delivery Checklist
- [ ] Work was done in an isolated task worktree or dedicated task checkout
- [ ] Task -> worktree -> branch mapping is explicit
- [ ] PR URL was posted back to the working issue
- [ ] UI-affecting changes include visual proof or explicitly say no visual change is expected
- [ ] Required reviewers were pulled in for affected lanes
- [ ] `make validate` output is included
- [ ] No routine direct-to-main delivery
